title: Better With Tech
description: This is a modpack surrounding the Better With Time mod for the purposes of making it easier to access and install
body:
![Better With Time Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c72d874885db15509345a185311572bee05db68b.png)

This is a tech-focused modpack surrounding the Better With Time mod for the purposes of making it easier to access, install, and play. It also includes a standard set of performance mods, pretty-ification mods, and EMI as a recipe viewer for which BWT has custom integration.

![A demo of mechanical power, the Turntable, and Block Dispenser](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RatherBeLunar/BetterWithTime/refs/heads/main/images/tech_demo_1.gif)

## Mods
- [Better With Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-with-time) - The core focus of the modpack, and the only mod that changes the game in a way that can't be removed from the pack without breaking your world
- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - Recipe viewer for which BWT has custom integration. Not sure how to obtain an item, or where/how to craft something? Use EMI to explore custom recipes
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) - The first of a trio of mods by [Masa](https://modrinth.com/user/masa) that are often used by tech-heavy vanilla players. Litematica makes it easy to import, build, save, and share large structures, which BWT incentivizes
- [MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud) - The second of Masa's mods, this one being for the purpose of displaying helpful technical information on the client side.
- [Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo) - The third of Masa's mods, which allows the tweaking and disabling of many parts of the vanilla game that obstruct a more straightforward technical experience. I personally recommend setting up hotkeys for the flexible block placement tweaks most of all.
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Pretty shaders!
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - a jaw-dropping and game-changing chunk rendering mod that makes the world look as big as it feels.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - Server-side optimization
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Client-side optimization
